rows.label: tlk43420145_05_msg0001
rows.name:
With things like this, the show
can't go on! I was so looking
forward to the play!

rows.label: tlk43420145_05_msg0002
rows.name:
Well, if we hold them off,
we can see it again. Just
have to be patient!

rows.label: tlk43420145_05_msg0003
rows.name:
Ion, Cole-san, and everyone
at the theater... I'll protect
every last one of you!
